claims: The skill requires an OPENAI_API_KEY and sends dependency analysis results (including project dependency data) to an external AI service (OpenAI) without providing an option to run without it or clear disclosure of the exact data shared. This exposes potentially sensitive project information to a third party, which is not strictly necessary for the core functionality of identifying unused and outdated dependencies, as tools like depcheck and npm outdated can run locally without external data transmission.
